name: open-library
description: Search 20 million books by title, author, ISBN, or subject. Returns book titles, authors, publish dates, page counts, and cover images. Use for questions like 'books by Ursula Le Guin', 'find books about machine learning', 'when was Dune published', 'search for books on Portland history'. Run by the Internet Archive.

input.description: Query parameters as JSON. 'q' for general search, or use specific fields: 'title', 'author', 'subject'. Optional: 'limit' (max results), 'page' (pagination).

q.description: General search query (e.g. 'dune frank herbert', 'machine learning')

output.description: JSON with 'numFound' (total matches), 'docs' array of books. Each book has 'title', 'author_name', 'first_publish_year', 'number_of_pages_median', 'subject', 'cover_i' (cover image ID), and 'key' (Open Library work ID).

usage: GET /search.json?author=ursula+le+guin&limit=5 → books by that author with titles, dates, page counts
